transactions.cancelDialogBody: Cancelling writes reversal entries to the stock ledger. The status becomes 'Canceled' and cannot be undone.
transactions.errEmptyLines: At least one line is required.
transactions.errInvalidQty: Quantity must be a number greater than 0.
transactions.errInvalidRef: Warehouse, supplier/customer, or item not found.
transactions.errInsufficientStock: Insufficient stock for one of the items.
transactions.errInsufficientStockCancel: Cannot cancel: the goods have already been issued.
transactions.noWarehousesYet: No warehouses yet. Create at least one warehouse before posting transactions.
transactions.receiptsDescription: Record inbound goods from suppliers or production.
transactions.issuesDescription: Record outbound goods to customers or internal use.
transactions.adjustmentsDescription: Manual stock corrections (stock count / lost / damaged).

stock.title: Stock on hand
stock.description: Current stock per item per warehouse from the stock ledger.

reports.indexDescription: Stock and movement reports. Exportable to Excel.
reports.movementsDescription: All stock movements from transactions within a date range.
reports.lowStockDescription: Items whose on-hand quantity is below their minimum threshold.
reports.stockCardIndexDescription: Open the Items list and click 'Stock Card' on the desired row.
reports.noLowStock: No items below the minimum stock threshold.
reports.truncatedNote: Result was truncated to the first 5,000 rows. Narrow your filter or use Excel export to get the full data.

masterData.name: Name
masterData.codeTaken: This code is already in use.
masterData.nameTaken: This name is already in use.
masterData.unitsDescription: Units of measure (Pcs, Box, Kg, etc.).
masterData.unitCodeHint: Short uppercase code, e.g. PCS, BOX, KG.
masterData.categoriesDescription: Group items for filters and reports.
masterData.itemsDescription: Master SKUs used in every transaction.
masterData.skuTaken: This SKU is already in use.
masterData.barcodeTaken: This barcode is already in use by another item.
masterData.invalidCategory: The selected category was not found.
masterData.invalidUnit: The selected unit was not found.
masterData.noUnitsYet: No units yet. Add at least one unit before creating an item.
masterData.customersDescription: Where goods are issued to (stores, branches, clients).

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your organization profile and document numbering formats.
settings.adminOnlyNotice: Only OWNER/ADMIN roles can change settings. You have read-only access.
settings.organizationDescription: Name, address, NPWP, logo, currency, timezone, and default locale.
settings.membersDescription: Invite teammates, change roles, and manage access to this organization.
settings.slugLockedHint: The slug is immutable since it is used in document numbers and historical records.
settings.docNumberingDescription: Set the numbering template, reset policy, and preview for each document type.
settings.docNumberingEditDescription: Edit the template and reset policy. Numbers already issued will not change.
settings.ph_SEQ: Zero-padded counter of N digits, e.g. {SEQ:4} → 0001

auth.name: Full name
auth.signUpSubtitle: Free to start — we create the organization for your company automatically.

members.title: Team members
members.description: People who have access to this organization.
members.adminOnlyNotice: Only OWNER/ADMIN can change membership. You have read-only access.
members.errLastOwner: Cannot remove or demote the last OWNER.
members.errCannotTouchSelf: You cannot change your own role or remove yourself.
members.inviteSent: Invitation created. Share the link below with the invitee:
members.inviteLinkHint: Email delivery is not yet configured — share this link manually (chat / WhatsApp) with the invitee. The link is valid for 7 days.
members.errAlreadyMember: This email already belongs to a member of the organization.
members.errAlreadyPending: There is already a pending invitation for this email.

invitation.title: Accept invitation
invitation.subtitle: {inviter} invited you to join {org}.
invitation.errExpired: This invitation link has expired. Ask the admin to send a new one.
invitation.errRevoked: This invitation link has been revoked by the admin.
invitation.errAlreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
invitation.errNotFound: This invitation link could not be found. Double-check it or ask for a new one.
invitation.errEmailTakenByOther: An account with this email was created in the meantime. Pick the 'I have an account' option.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.nextStep1: Master data: items, categories, units, suppliers, customers.
dashboard.nextStep2: Transactions: goods receipt, goods issue, stock adjustment.
dashboard.nextStep3: Reports: stock card, movements, low-stock + Excel/PDF export.

landing.headline: Run your warehouse with less mess.
landing.subhead: Inbound & outbound tracking ready for many companies in one app.
landing.featureMultiTenantBody: Each company gets isolated data, its own document formats, and its own users.
landing.featureBarcodeBody: Capture transactions fast with a phone camera — no extra hardware required.
landing.featureReportsBody: Stock cards, movements, low-stock — export to Excel or PDF in one click.
